name: chr19_19p13_3_GAMT_SD
description: 19p13.3 subtelomeric SD block containing GAMT (guanidinoacetate N-methyltransferase) flanked by short SDs and adjacent paralog clusters (DAZAP1, RPS15). The 19p subtelomere is unusually SD-dense in the first 2 Mb and contributes to recurrent subtelomeric deletions and translocations.

architecture.internal_structure: Several 5-15 kb SD blocks at 95-98% identity flanking GAMT, MUM1, NDUFS7; subtelomeric SD enrichment characteristic of the 19p tip; partial inter-chromosomal SDs to other subtelomeres.
